approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub Build Portfolio Readback that ranks and merges Scoper-ready source-traced build candidates without promotion or writes.
constraints: Do not create backlog cards, Scoper records, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, approval records, route records, destination records, Harlan messages, model calls, extraction runs, connector probes, browser sessions, or external writes.
Do not auto-promote Director, Scoper, or Portfolio recommendations into backlog, sprint, route action, Harlan, or build execution.
Only include candidates with Scoper-ready status, source-trace-ready status, raw atom proof, raw hit proof, and a complete portfolio candidate.
Keep every portfolio group proposal-only and behind Steve approval after portfolio review.
Fail proof if any group is auto-promoted, missing source lineage, unbounded, or claiming persisted portfolio/backlog/sprint writes.
